Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: simple vaults [300001362], vaults (structural elements) [300001324], vaults and vault components [300052244], enclosing structural elements [300078050], structural elements [300078048], structural elements and components for structural elements [300078046], architectural elements [300000885], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Vaults of plain, semicircular cross section supported by parallel walls or arcades.
Gewelven met een eenvoudig, halfrond dwarsprofiel ondersteund door evenwijdige muren of arcades.
由兩側平行的牆面或拱廊加以支撐，無裝飾的半圓筒式拱頂。
Abóbadas de seção transversal lisa e semicircular suportadas por paredes ou arcadas paralelas.
Sistemi di copertura non piana, a forma di semicirconferenza, utilizzati per coprire spazi di forma genericamente rettangolare.
أقبية ذات مقطع عرضي نصف دائري عادي، مدعومة بجدران أو أروقة متوازية.

Source.Source_ID: 2000033931/Putnam and Carlson, Architectural and Building Trades Dictionary (1974)
2000032401/Fleming et al., Penguin Dictionary of Architecture (1981)
2000051218/Alvarez et al., Diccionario de la decoración (1968)
2000051218/Alvarez et al., Diccionario de la decoración (1968)
2000121987/ThARCH: Pugliano, Il riconoscimento, la documentazione, il catalogo dei beni architettonici (2009)
2000122297/DIPAI: Silvestrini, Dizionario illustrato plurilingue di arte italiana (2005)
